# Run Lossless CATES Optimization

## Objective

Use the commit-pinned optimizer deliberately, with dry-run evidence and human
approval before any write.

## Required Steps

1. Read `cates-exercises/08-cates-lossless-optimization.md`.
2. Run the optimizer with `--dry-run` against only the sample repository.
3. Save the dry-run report to `reports/08-optimizer-dry-run.md`.
4. Summarize proposed files, transforms, token change, guarantee checks, and
   manual opportunities.
5. Ask for explicit confirmation before running the optimizer without
   `--dry-run`.
6. When confirmed, apply with `--backup`.
7. Re-run stable analysis and save `reports/08-after-optimizer.json`.
8. Run a second dry run to verify no repeatable mechanical work remains.

## Safety Boundary

Do not auto-apply security remediation, scope restructuring, cross-file
deduplication, or semantic rewrites. Keep all writes under the workspace.

## Validation

Confirm meaningful instructions and code blocks remain and compare findings
with the pre-optimizer report.
